# phone.recording_deleted

The **Call recording has been deleted** event triggers when a recording has been deleted.
## Prerequisites

* [Zoom Phone Plan](https://zoom.us/phonesystem)
* **Event subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event notification endpoint URL**.
	* Your app must either be a user or account level OAuth App or a Webhook Only app. For more information, see [Enable webhooks](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks).
	* **Call recording has been deleted** subscription must be enabled under the **Zoom Phone** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:admin`,`phone:write:admin`,`phone:read`,`phone:write`,`phone:master`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:call_recording:master`,`phone:read:call_recording`,`phone:read:call_recording:admin`

**Event type**: `phone.recording_deleted`

event_ts.description: The timestamp (in milliseconds since epoch) at which the event occurred. The value of this field is returned in long (int64) format.

account_id.description: The ID of the account to which the recording belongs.

event_ts.description: The timestamp (in milliseconds since epoch) at which the event occurred. The value of this field is returned in long (int64) format.

account_id.description: The ID of the account to which the recording belongs.

# phone.caller_call_log_completed
---
The **Caller call log is completed** event triggers every time the outgoing call log record for a call is made available for the Caller to view.

## Prerequisites
* [Zoom Phone Plan](https://zoom.us/phonesystem)
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
  * Your app must either be a user or account level OAuth App or a Webhook Only app. For more information, see [Enable webhooks](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks).
	* **"Caller call log is completed"** subscription must be enabled under the **Zoom Phone** event.




**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:admin`,`phone:write:admin`,`phone:read`,`phone:write`,`phone:master`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:call_log:master`,`phone:read:call_log`,`phone:read:call_log:admin`

**Event type**: `phone.caller_call_log_completed`

event_ts.description: Timestamp (in milliseconds since epoch) at which the event occurred. The value of this field is returned in long(int64) format.

account_id.description: Account ID of the caller.

id.description: Unique Identifier of the call log.

caller_number.description: Phone number of the caller.

caller_number_type.description:
Phone number type of the caller. The value can be one of the following:
* 1 - extension number.
* 2 - phone number.

caller_number_source.description:
Phone number source of the caller. The value can be one of the following:
* internal - ZP native.
* external — BYOC or Provider Exchange.
* byop — Premise peering.
Not available when caller_number_type = 1.

callee_number.description: Phone number of the callee.

callee_number_type.description:
The callee's phone number type:
* 1 — extension number.
* 2 — phone number.
* 3 — Customized emergency number.

callee_number_source.description:
Phone number source of the caller. The value can be one of the following:
* internal - ZP native.
* external — BYOC or Provider Exchange.
* byop — Premise peering.
Not available when callee_number_type = 1.

date_time.description: Start date and time of the call.

id.description: The phone number's assigned target [site](https://support.zoom.us/hc/en-us/articles/360020809672-Managing-Multiple-Sites). Sites allow you to organize the phone users in your organization. For example, sites created and based on different office locations.

has_recording.description: Indicates whether the call log includes recording or not.

recording_type.description: Recording type of the call. This value field can be OnDemand or Automatic.

has_voicemail.description: Indicates whether the call log includes voicemail or not.

call_type.description:
The type of call:
* voip (Voice over IP)
* pstn (Public Switched Telephone Network)
* tollfree
* international
* contactCenter

direction.description: Direction of the call. The value of this field can either be inbound or outbound.

forwarded_to.description: Indicates who the call was forwarded to.

number_type.description: Phone number types: 1 - Extension 2- E164 number 3 - Custom number.

forwarded_by.description: Indicates where the call was forwarded from.

# phone.recording_completed_for_access_member
---

The **Call recording is completed for access member** event triggers when a recording of a Zoom phone call completes. The access members of the recording owner will receive this event.

## Prerequisites
* [Zoom Phone Plan](https://zoom.us/phonesystem)
* **Event subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event notification endpoint URL**.
	* Your app must either be a user or account level OAuth App or a Webhook Only app. For more information, see [Enable webhooks](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks).
	* **Call recording is completed for access member** subscription must be enabled under the **Zoom Phone** event.



**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:admin`,`phone:write:admin`,`phone:read`,`phone:write`,`phone:master`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:call_recording:master`,`phone:read:call_recording`,`phone:read:call_recording:admin`

**Event type**: `phone.recording_completed_for_access_member`

event_ts.description: The timestamp (in milliseconds since epoch) at which the event occurred. The value of this field is returned in long(int64) format.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who recorded the call.

id.description: The recording ID is the unique Identifier of the call recording.

caller_account_code.description: The caller's account code. To dial between accounts, use the format: [Account code] - [extension number].

caller_number.description: The phone number of the caller.

caller_number_type.description:
The phone number type of the caller. The value can be one of the following:
* 1 - internal 
* 2 - external

callee_account_code.description: The callee's account code. To dial between accounts, use the format: [Account code] - [extension number].

callee_number.description: The phone number of the callee.

callee_number_type.description:
The phone number type of the callee. The value can be one of the following:
* 1 - internal 
* 2 - external

duration.description: The duration of the call in seconds.

download_url.description:
The URL to download the call recording.

To download the recording via this URL, you must add an “access_token” query parameter to the download URL and provide either the user's OAuth access token or your app's **JWT** as the value of the “access_token” parameter.

For example, if the value of this field is "https://zoom.us/v2/phone/recording/download/abcD666T”, the complete URL path to download the recording will be as below:

https://zoom.us/v2/phone/recording/download/abcD666T?access_token={YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN_HERE}

date_time.description: The start date and time of the call.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user.

call_id.description: The unique identifier of the call.

recording_type.description: The recording type of the call. This value field can be OnDemand or Automatic.

id.description: The site ID of the call.

type.description: The owner type. This value field can be user or callQueue.

extension_number.description: The extension number of the owner

has_access_permission.description: Whether the owner has the access permission to this recording.

direction.description: The direction of the call. The value of this field can either be inbound or outbound.

outgoing_by.description: The call-initiating user. The current recording must belong to the initiator and call queue for it to be available.

accepted_by.description: The call-receiving user. The current recording must belong to the receiver and call queue for it to be available.

event_ts.description: The timestamp (in milliseconds since epoch) at which the event occurred. The value of this field is returned in long(int64) format.

# phone.fax_log_permanently_deleted
---
The **Fax Log Permanently Deleted** event triggers when one or more fax logs are permanently deleted from a Zoom Phone account.

This event occurs when fax logs are removed permanently, typically after being deleted from the trash or recycle bin.

## Prerequisites
* [Zoom Phone Plan](https://zoom.us/phonesystem)
* **Event subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event notification endpoint URL**.
	* Your app must either be a user or account level OAuth App or a Webhook Only app. For more information, see [Enable webhooks](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks).
	* **Fax Log Permanently Deleted** subscription must be enabled under the **Zoom Phone** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read`,`phone:read:admin`,`phone:write`,`phone:write:admin`,`phone:master`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:list_fax_log`,`phone:read:list_fax_log:admin`,`phone:read:list_fax_log:master`

**Event type**: `phone.fax_log_permanently_deleted`

event_ts.description: A timestamp, in milliseconds since epoch, at which the event occurred.

account_id.description: The owner account ID.

object.description: object

fax_logs.description: The list of permanently deleted fax logs.

event_ts.description: A timestamp, in milliseconds since epoch, at which the event occurred.

account_id.description: The owner account ID.

object.description: object

fax_logs.description: The list of permanently deleted fax logs.

# phone.transfer_recipient_updated
---

The **Recipient of warm/blind transfer call updated** event triggers when the recipient of warm/blind transfer call is updated, to inform that the call connector has changed.
**Note**: Applicable only to Zoom desktop clients (version 6.1.0 or later) using Zoom native phone numbers. Not applicable to IP phones or BYOC numbers.
## Prerequisites
* [Zoom Phone Plan](https://zoom.us/phonesystem)
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* Your app must either be a user or account level OAuth App or a Webhook Only app. For more information, see [Enable webhooks](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks).
	* **"Recipient of warm/blind transfer call updated"** subscription must be enabled under the **Zoom Phone** event.


**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:admin`,`phone:write:admin`,`phone:read`,`phone:write`,`phone:master`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:call:master`,`phone:read:call`,`phone:read:call:admin`

**Event type**: `phone.transfer_recipient_updated`

event_ts.description: The timestamp in milliseconds since epoch when the event occurred, in int64 format.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user.

failure_reason.description: The reason why the recipient update for the warm/blind transfer call failed. An empty string indicates success.

call_id.description: The unique identifier for the call.

id.description: The unique identifier for the owner.

type.description: The extension type of the owner.

phone_number.description: The phone number of the recipient in E164 format.

recipient.description: The recipient who received the warm/blind transfer call from the event owner.

date_time.description: The date and time (GMT) when the recipient of the warm/blind transfer call was updated, in yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z' format.

event_ts.description: The timestamp in milliseconds since epoch when the event occurred, in int64 format.

# phone.sms_sent
---
The **SMS sent from Zoom phone** event triggers when a user account sends an SMS message. The sender must either be a user on your account or a user of your [webhook-enabled](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks) app.

Zoom phone users can send text messages [(SMS)](https://support.zoom.us/hc/en-us/articles/360054155112-Using-SMS) using the Zoom desktop client or a [webhook-enabled](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks) mobile app.




## **Prerequisites**
* **Event subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event notification endpoint URL**.
	* **SMS sent from Zoom phone** subscription enabled under the **Phone** event.






**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:admin`,`phone:write:admin`,`phone:read`,`phone:write`,`phone:master`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:sms_message:master`,`phone:read:sms_message`,`phone:read:sms_message:admin`

**Event type**: `phone.sms_sent`

event_ts.description: The timestamp (in milliseconds since epoch) at which the event occurred. The value of this field is returned in long(int64) format.

account_id.description: The account ID of the owner.

object.description: The payload of SMS/MMS message that was sent.

failure_reason.description: The reason for SMS send failure. An empty field means the SMS send was successful.

sms_sender_user_id.description: The user ID of the call queue or auto receptionist member who sent the SMS when the owner type is callQueue or autoReceptionist.

id.description: The unique Identifier for a media file.

size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

download_url.description: The URL using which the file can be downloaded.

date_time.description: The date and time at which the SMS was received.

id.description: The unique identifier for a media file.

size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

download_url.description: The URL using which the file can be downloaded.

date_time.description: The date and time at which the SMS was sent.

phone_number_campaign_opt_statuses.description: The list of opt statuses for each number pair.

consumer_phone_number.description: The end user's phone number in E164 format that sends the Opt-in or Opt-out keyword to the Zoom Phone number.

zoom_phone_user_number.description: The Zoom user's phone number in E164 format that receives the Opt-in or Opt-out keyword from the end user.

opt_in_status.description:
The Opt-In status between the Zoom Phone user number and consumer phone number. This is a sub-status of opt_status and uses the following enumeration: 
0: Default status. The Opt-In status for the Zoom Phone user number cannot be determined. This may occur when the Zoom Phone user number is not associated with a Campaign, among other reasons.
1: This is a new SMS session and an Opt-In message must be sent first.
2: An Opt-In message has been sent and a response is pending.
3: An Opt-In message has been sent and the recipient has consented to receive additional SMS messages.
4: An Opt-In message has been sent, but the recipient has declined to receive additional SMS messages, or the number has been configured to block all outbound SMS messages.

opt_in_message.description: If opt_in_status=1, the opt_in_message will return the Opt-In message of the Campaign bound to zoom_phone_user_number. In this case, you must send the opt_in_message as the first message in the SMS session and then wait for the Opt-In response.
opt_in_message.example: Text START to receive text messages from ZOOM. Message frequency may vary. Message and Data Rates may apply. To end messaging from us, reply with STOP. Reply with HELP for more information.

1: This is a new SMS session and an Opt-In message must be sent first.

# phone.sms_campaign_number_opt_out
The **SMS Opt-out event from Zoom phone** triggers when an account user receives an SMS message with text of an opt-out keyword, such as **STOP**. The recipient must be a user of your [webhook-enabled](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks) app.

Zoom Phone admins can receive opt-out-status event using a [webhook-enabled](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks) mobile app.


## **Prerequisites**:
* **Event subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event notification endpoint URL**.
	* **SMS Opt-out event from Zoom phone** subscription enabled under the **Phone** event.





**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:admin`,`phone:master`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:sms_campaign_number_opt_status:master`,`phone:read:sms_campaign_number_opt_status:admin`

date_time.description: The date time at which the event occurred. The value of this field is returned in format FMT_DATE_ISO_2 according to the account's timezone. Otherwise it would be in UTC timezone.

## Prerequisites
* [Zoom Phone Plan](https://zoom.us/phonesystem)
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:

	* **Call recording is completed** subscription must be enabled under the **Zoom Phone** event.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who recorded the call.

id.description: The recording ID is the unique Identifier of the call recording.

caller_account_code.description: The caller's account code. To dial between accounts, use the format: [Account code] - [extension number].

caller_number.description: The phone number of the caller.

The **SMS sent failed from Zoom phone** event triggers when a user account fails to send the SMS message. The sender must either be a user on your account or a user of your [webhook-enabled](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks) app.

## **Prerequisites**
* **Event subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event notification endpoint URL**.
	* **SMS sent failed from Zoom phone** subscription enabled under the **Phone** event.






**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:admin`,`phone:write:admin`,`phone:read`,`phone:write`,`phone:master`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:sms_message:master`,`phone:read:sms_message`,`phone:read:sms_message:admin`

failure_reason.description: The reason for an SMS send failure.

is_message_owner.description: Whether it is the owner of the message.

sms_sender_user_id.description: The user ID of the call queue or auto receptionist member who sent the SMS when the owner type is callQueue or autoReceptionist.

download_url.description: The URL to use to download the file.

date_time.description: The date and time at which the SMS was sent.

phone_number_campaign_opt_statuses.description: The list of opt statuses for each number pair.

consumer_phone_number.description: The end user's phone number in E164 format that sends the Opt-in or Opt-out keyword to the Zoom Phone number.

zoom_phone_user_number.description: The Zoom user's phone number in E164 format that receives the Opt-in or Opt-out keyword from the end user.

opt_in_status.description:
The Opt-In status between the Zoom Phone user number and consumer phone number. This is a sub-status of opt_status and uses the following enumeration: 
0: Default status. The Opt-In status for the Zoom Phone user number cannot be determined. This may occur when the Zoom Phone user number is not associated with a Campaign, among other reasons.
1: This is a new SMS session and an Opt-In message must be sent first.
2: An Opt-In message has been sent and a response is pending.
3: An Opt-In message has been sent and the recipient has consented to receive additional SMS messages.
4: An Opt-In message has been sent, but the recipient has declined to receive additional SMS messages, or the number has been configured to block all outbound SMS messages.

opt_in_message.description: If opt_in_status=1, the opt_in_message will return the Opt-In message of the Campaign bound to zoom_phone_user_number. In this case, you must send the opt_in_message as the first message in the SMS session and then wait for the Opt-In response.
opt_in_message.example: Text START to receive text messages from ZOOM. Message frequency may vary. Message and Data Rates may apply. To end messaging from us, reply with STOP. Reply with HELP for more information.

---

## Prerequisites
* [Zoom Phone Plan](https://zoom.us/phonesystem)
* **Event subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
  * Your app must either be a user or account level OAuth App or a Webhook Only app. For more information, see [Enable webhooks](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks).
	* **Callee call log is completed** subscription must be enabled under the **Zoom Phone** event.

caller_user_id.description: The caller's user ID. This field will only exist if the caller is a user of this account.

caller_number.description: Phone number of the caller.

caller_number_type.description:
Phone number type of the caller. The value can be one of the following:
* 1 - extension number.
* 2 - phone number.

caller_number_source.description:
Phone number source of the caller. The value can be one of the following:
* internal - ZP native.
* external — BYOC or Provider Exchange.
* byop — Premise peering.
Not available when caller_number_type = 1.

---

The **Warm transfer is initiated** event triggers when a call warm transfer is initiated.
**Note**: Applicable only to Zoom desktop clients (version 6.1.0 or later) using Zoom native phone numbers. Not applicable to IP phones or BYOC numbers.
## Prerequisites
* [Zoom Phone Plan](https://zoom.us/phonesystem)
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* Your app must either be a user or account level OAuth App or a Webhook Only app. For more information, see [Enable webhooks](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks).
	* **"Warm transfer is initiated"** subscription must be enabled under the **Zoom Phone** event.




**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:admin`,`phone:write:admin`,`phone:read`,`phone:write`,`phone:master`

event_ts.description: The timestamp in milliseconds since epoch when the event occurred, in long (int64) format.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user.

failure_reason.description: The failure reason for the warm transfer. An empty string indicates a successful transfer.

type.description:
The owner type:
* user
* callQueue
* autoReceptionist
* commonAreaPhone
* sharedLineGroup

transfer_phone_number.description: The phone number required for the warm transfer. This may be a user's phone number, extension number, or phone number in E164 format.

transfer_call_id.description: The newly generated call ID when the call is transferred.

date_time.description: The date and time (GMT) when the call warm transfer was answered, in yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z' format.

# phone.account_settings_updated
---

The **Account settings updated** event is triggered every time an Account's settings are updated.

## Prerequisites
* [Zoom Phone Plan](https://zoom.us/phonesystem)
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
* Your app must either be a user or account level OAuth App or a Webhook Only app. For more information, see [Enable webhooks](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks).
* **"Account settings updated"** subscription must be enabled under the **Zoom Phone** event.




**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:admin`,`phone:write:admin`,`phone:read`,`phone:write`,`phone:master`

# phone.callee_meeting_inviting
---

The **Callee invited to join a meeting** event triggers each time a callee over Zoom Phone escalates a phone call to a Zoom meeting.

## Prerequisites
* [Zoom Phone Plan](https://zoom.us/phonesystem)
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* Your app must either be a user or account level OAuth App or a Webhook Only app. For more information, see [Enable webhooks](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks).
	* The "**Callee invited to join a meeting**" subscription must be enabled under the **Zoom Phone** event.




**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:admin`,`phone:write:admin`,`phone:read`,`phone:write`,`phone:master`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:call:master`,`phone:read:call`,`phone:read:call:admin`

**Event type**: `phone.callee_meeting_inviting`

# phone.emergency_alert
---

The **Emergency Call Alert** event triggers every time Zoom phone users dial 911 from their Zoom phone. To receive this notification, you must meet the prerequisites.

## Prerequisites
* User must have enrolled in a [Zoom Phone Plan](https://zoom.us/phonesystem).
* User must have enabled [normadic emergency service](https://support.zoom.us/hc/en-us/articles/360042699912-Setting-up-nomadic-emergency-services) and [emergency addresses](https://support.zoom.us/hc/en-us/articles/360021062871).
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* Your app must either be a user or account level OAuth App or a Webhook Only app. For more information, see [Enable webhooks](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks).
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* An **Emergency Call Alert** subscription must be enabled under the **Zoom Phone** event.





**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone_e911:read:admin`,`phone_e911:read`

# phone.generic_device_provision
---

The **Zoom Phone device provisioned** event triggers every time an admin or end user makes any of the following changes to a device:
* Adding or removing a Direct Inward Dialing (DID) service
* Adding or removing a delegation
* Adding or removing a shared line group
* Changing line labels or caller ID information
* Changing the site where a user is assigned
* Changing the Session Initiation Protocol (SIP) Zone assignment for a site where the user is assigned
* Adding or removing a device from a user

To receive this notification, you must meet the prerequisites listed below.

## Prerequisites
* [Zoom Phone Plan](https://zoom.us/phonesystem)
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* Your app must either be a user or account level OAuth App or a Webhook Only app. For more information, see [Enable webhooks](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks).
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* **"Zoom Phone device provisioned"** subscription must be enabled under the **Zoom Phone** event.

# phone.recording_paused
---
The **Call recording is paused** event triggers when the owner pauses the recording during a phone call.

## Prerequisites

* [Zoom Phone Plan](https://zoom.us/phonesystem)
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* Your app must either be a user or account level OAuth App or a Webhook Only app. For more information, see [Enable webhooks](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks).
	* **Call recording is paused** subscription must be enabled under the **Zoom Phone** event.






**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:admin`,`phone:write:admin`,`phone:read`,`phone:write`,`phone:master`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:call_recording:master`,`phone:read:call_recording`,`phone:read:call_recording:admin`

**Event type**: `phone.recording_paused`

account_id.description: The account ID of the user.

callee_number.description: Phone number or the extension number of the callee.

direction.description: Direction of the call: inbound or outbound.

date_time.description: Time and date when the recording was paused.

# phone.sms_received
---
The **SMS received by Zoom phone** event triggers when a user account receives an SMS message. The recipient must be a user on your account or a user of your [webhook-enabled](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks) app.

Zoom Phone users can receive text messages [(SMS)](https://support.zoom.us/hc/en-us/articles/360054155112-Using-SMS) using the Zoom desktop client or a [webhook-enabled](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks) mobile app.




## **Prerequisites**
* **Event subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event notification endpoint URL**.
	* **SMS received by Zoom phone** subscription enabled under the **Phone** event.






**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:admin`,`phone:write:admin`,`phone:read`,`phone:write`,`phone:master`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:sms_message:master`,`phone:read:sms_message`,`phone:read:sms_message:admin`

**Event type**: `phone.sms_received`

event_ts.description: The timestamp (in milliseconds since epoch) at which the event occurred. The value of this field is returned in long(int64) format.

account_id.description: The account ID of the owner.

object.description: The payload of the received SMS/MMS.

is_message_owner.description: Whether it is the owner of the message.

id.description: The user ID of the user who received this SMS.

team_id.description: The owner's ID when the owner type is callQueue or autoReceptionist.

size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

download_url.description: The URL using which the file can be downloaded.

date_time.description: The date and time at which the SMS was received.

size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

download_url.description: The URL using which the file can be downloaded.

date_time.description: The date and time at which the SMS was received.

phone_number_campaign_opt_statuses.description: The list of opt statuses for each number pair.

consumer_phone_number.description: The end user's phone number in E164 format that sends the Opt-in or Opt-out keyword to the Zoom Phone number.

zoom_phone_user_number.description: The Zoom user's phone number in E164 format that receives the Opt-in or Opt-out keyword from the end user.

opt_in_status.description:
The Opt-In status between the Zoom Phone user number and consumer phone number. This is a sub-status of opt_status and uses the following enumeration: 
0: Default status. The Opt-In status for the Zoom Phone user number cannot be determined. This may occur when the Zoom Phone user number is not associated with a Campaign, among other reasons.
1: This is a new SMS session and an Opt-In message must be sent first.
2: An Opt-In message has been sent and a response is pending.
3: An Opt-In message has been sent and the recipient has consented to receive additional SMS messages.
4: An Opt-In message has been sent, but the recipient has declined to receive additional SMS messages, or the number has been configured to block all outbound SMS messages.

opt_in_message.description: If opt_in_status=1, the opt_in_message will return the Opt-In message of the Campaign bound to zoom_phone_user_number. In this case, you must send the opt_in_message as the first message in the SMS session and then wait for the Opt-In response.
opt_in_message.example: Text START to receive text messages from ZOOM. Message frequency may vary. Message and Data Rates may apply. To end messaging from us, reply with STOP. Reply with HELP for more information.

opt_in_status.description:
The Opt-In status between the Zoom Phone user number and consumer phone number. This is a sub-status of opt_status and uses the following enumeration: 
0: Default status. The Opt-In status for the Zoom Phone user number cannot be determined. This may occur when the Zoom Phone user number is not associated with a Campaign, among other reasons.
1: This is a new SMS session and an Opt-In message must be sent first.
2: An Opt-In message has been sent and a response is pending.
3: An Opt-In message has been sent and the recipient has consented to receive additional SMS messages.
4: An Opt-In message has been sent, but the recipient has declined to receive additional SMS messages, or the number has been configured to block all outbound SMS messages.

# phone.peering_number_cnam_updated
---

The **CNAM has changed** event triggers when the Caller ID name (CNAM) has been updated for PSTN phone numbers.

## Prerequisites
* [Zoom Phone Plan](https://zoom.us/phonesystem)
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* Your app must either be a user or account level OAuth App or a Webhook Only app. For more information, see [Enable webhooks](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks).
	* **"CNAM has changed"** subscription must be enabled under the **Zoom Phone** event.

> This event is for use by partners that have completed the MoU to peer with Zoom. To become a peering provider/ carrier, please submit your [request](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSewkY6ixVyKVNkWC-vgmejC16gigxsJWXji3dWzE3XlWtjsgg/viewform).




**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone_peering:read:admin`,`phone_peering:write:admin`,`phone_peering:master`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `phone:read:peering_number:master`,`phone:read:peering_number:admin`

**Event type**: `phone.peering_number_cnam_updated`

event_ts.description: Timestamp (in milliseconds since epoch) at which the event occurred. The value of this field is returned in long(int64) format.

account_id.description: Account ID of the customer using provider exchange.

phone_numbers.description: The phone numbers with CNAM updates.

event_ts.description: Timestamp (in milliseconds since epoch) at which the event occurred. The value of this field is returned in long(int64) format.
